Translations.11546: [11546]A large, ancient-looking leather-bound tome sits closed on a handsome wooden table. Its cover is ornately decorated with gold overlay and embossed accents. The book opens of its own accord as a booming voice is heard.
Translations.11551: [11551]The music accelerates. The page turns to an illustration of hundreds of landlocked castles in close proximity. It looks like an overcrowded suburd packed to the gills with McMansion castles.
Translations.11553: [11553]The page turns to reveal an elaborate pop-up artwork of hundreds of floating castles. They are suspended above a sea of clouds and a banner displays the name of Opulencia.
Translations.11555: [11555]The page turns to reveal an illustration of a massive treasure room filled with riches. An anonymous hero is seen filling his sack with loot - he is dwarfed by the giant pile of gold and gems that lies in front of him. We hear sound effects of the hero cackling contentedly.
Translations.11557: [11557]The page turns to an illustration of a lineup of comically menacing creatures and traps guarding the same treasure pile we saw in the previous illustration. A hero is fleeing with a snotter biting his butt. We hear sound effects of the hero's pained yelping and lots of different creatures growling.
Translations.11559: [11559]The page turns to an illustration of the outside of a gaudy commercial office. It looks like a mix between a used car dealership and an off-brand casino.
Translations.11561: [11561]The page turns to an illustration of Cornelius Richling, agent to the stars.
